---
title: "Learn"
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: items
  type: grid
  sort: "date desc"
  image-align: right
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  page-size: 12
  fields: [image, title, date, categories, reading-time, description]
---

[KAXA Learn Hub]{.hero-kicker}

This page collects learning information, articles/blog posts, and video series.  
Add new content under `learn/items/` and it will appear here automatically after render.
